products.title: Products | ESG Marketplace
products.heading: Products
products.lead: Buy sustainable / ESG items and earn green points (local demo). List items under Sell to earn points too.

redeemPage.title: Redeem | ESG Marketplace
redeemPage.heading: Redeem points for shopping credit
redeemPage.lead: Similar to iPASS MONEY green points or bookstore loyalty: earn by buying and selling, redeem into shopping credit at checkout. Partner offers (e.g. iPASS MONEY) can be added later.
redeemPage.ratioNote: Demo: 1 point = NT$1 credit (ratio can be configured later).
redeemPage.partnerNote: Future: integrate with iPASS MONEY and other partners.
redeemPage.legacyHint: RFID / RTDB demo below; separate from shopping credit above.

home.title: ESG Marketplace | Home
home.welcome: Sustainable trade starts with every order
home.description: List and buy ESG products—earn green points and redeem shopping credit.
home.esg2: Points for purchases and for successful listings. With a cloud database, accounts and history will sync across devices.
home.points2: Checkout discounts using shopping credit and point offset, or redeem partner offers in the future.
home.local2: Like transit or bookstore rewards—making sustainable choices visible and cumulative.
home.redeem2: Go to Points redeem to convert points to shopping credit.
home.browseHint: See Products to add items to your cart.

sell.title: Sell | ESG Marketplace
sell.heading: List a product
sell.lead: Submit details (saved locally for now). A small point reward is granted on submit; connect a database for real listings.
sell.imageHint: Click to upload an image, or drag and drop an image here
sell.delistBody: Once delisted, the product will be hidden from the platform. You can view it through the 'Delisted' filter or relist it. Are you sure you want to delist?
sell.namePlaceholder: e.g. Fair Trade Coffee Drip Bag
sell.esgPlaceholder: e.g. reduced plastic packaging, supply chain traceability

cart.title: Cart | ESG Marketplace
cart.heading: Cart
cart.lead: Apply shopping credit and green points (local demo). Points are earned on the amount you pay.
cart.empty: Your cart is empty. Add items from Products.
cart.pointsHelp: 10 points = NT$1 off; max 30% of payable after credit.
cart.toastOk: Checkout complete! Points and history updated (local).

profile.title: Profile | ESG Marketplace
profile.heading: Profile
profile.lead: Local demo of points, credit, and history. Connect Firebase etc. for real accounts.

login.title: Sign in | ESG Marketplace
login.heading: Sign in or register
login.lead: Email and social sign-in will appear here once Firebase Authentication is enabled.
